question: Comment naviguer dans des collections imbriquees (parent/enfants) ?

principles.text: Routes imbriquees parent/:id/children. Breadcrumbs pour 3+ niveaux. Bouton retour pour 2 niveaux. Jamais de modals pour navigation detail.

sources.name: React Router nested routes
sources.quote: Nested routes enable hierarchical URL structures matching UI component hierarchy

sources.name: NNg Breadcrumbs Guidelines
sources.quote: Breadcrumbs support wayfinding for hierarchies of 3+ levels

sources.name: W3C ARIA Breadcrumb pattern
sources.quote: Breadcrumb navigation with aria-label and aria-current for accessibility

sources.name: Material Design Navigation
sources.quote: Lateral and forward navigation patterns for hierarchical content
